violations.text: The establishment does not have a written procedure for cleaning vomit and diarrhea. Inspector provided RIDOH guidance during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/29/2024
Cases of various beverages were observed stored on the floor in the storage and salesfloor areas. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 08/12/2024

The floor under the chips in the salesfloor area has an accumulation of food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 08/12/2024
